description_long: This is a modern sailing yacht with a sleek, streamlined monohull painted in a vibrant orange with white and orange-striped sails. The deck features a spacious cockpit area with visible seating, railings, and a central cabin structure, all designed for both comfort and functionality. The yacht is equipped with a tall mast supporting a large mainsail and jib, both of which are taut and cleanly rigged. The hull has a pronounced keel for stability and performance, and the stern includes a small open area with a ladder for water access. The deck layout is open, with clear walkways and safety railings along the perimeter. The overall design suggests a vessel built for both leisure cruising and competitive sailing, with attention to both aesthetics and nautical efficiency.
description: A sleek orange and white sailing yacht with a tall mast, striped sails, and a spacious, well-equipped deck. The vessel features a streamlined monohull, open cockpit, and modern nautical design.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pointed bow, tall mast, and the main sail with orange stripes, as well as the open cockpit and deck details.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the full length of the hull, the keel beneath, and the arrangement of the sails and rigging.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the stern, open cockpit, rear railings, and the access ladder, with the cabin structure visible amidships.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the stern, cockpit seating, and the transition from the deck to the cabin, with the mast and sails extending forward.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a deep keel, streamlined bow, and a smooth, continuous orange hull with white accents and no visible chines. The hull features a pronounced underbody for stability and performance.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level deck with a central cockpit, open walkways along both sides, safety railings around the perimeter, and a rear access ladder. The cockpit includes seating and is partially surrounded by railings, with visible winches and deck hardware.
attribute_cabin_structure: One main cabin structure located amidships, with a low, aerodynamic profile and no visible windows or doors from the exterior. The cabin is integrated into the deck and provides shelter and access to the interior.
